name: Payer Rule Change
description: BlueStar adds new LCD restriction on CPT 99214. Scrubbing agent flags 47 affected claims; coding agent re-reviews.

rule.description: New LCD: 99214 restricted to HTN/DM dx only

expected_outcome: scrubbing_agent flags ~47 claims; analytics agent raises rule-change alert

name: Denial Spike
description: 18% of Medicare claims denied CO-50 on same day. Analytics agent alerts; denial agent batch-classifies and drafts appeals.
expected_outcome: denial_rate_alert KPI fires; denial_agent processes batch

name: Charge Lag Alert
description: Charge lag spikes to 5.2 days for orthopedics. Analytics agent alerts; dashboard shows trend; HITL task created.
expected_outcome: charge_lag KPI threshold breach; HITL task created

name: Eligibility Gap
description: 12 patients coverage lapsed before scheduled service. Eligibility agent flags; HITL queue shows 12 tasks; financial counseling offered.
expected_outcome: 12 eligibility.escalated events; 12 HITL tasks of priority High

name: Underpayment Pattern
description: Apex PPO underpaying 99215 by 12% for 30 days. Tracking agent flags variance; analytics agent surfaces systemic pattern.
expected_outcome: tracking_agent flags ~20 claims; analytics alert fires

name: High-Value Denial Overturn
description: $28,400 inpatient claim denied CO-4. Coding agent fixes; appeal auto-submitted in under 90 seconds.
expected_outcome: denial_agent classifies -> coding_agent corrects -> appeal submitted
